items.name: Orinthian Mace
items.description: This is no ordinary mace. Leaves behind a damaging trail of energy everywhere it is carried.

items.name: Spring Saber
items.description: Every rose has its thorn. Swing at your enemies dealing roughly 17 damage per hit!

items.name: Red Laser Scythe
items.description: Red is the future. Slash this powerful laser scythe to do 30 damage per hit. Click and hold to do some animated swinging to unleash a laser projectile.

items.name: Pompous, the Cloud
items.description: Fly this cumulus cloud all over ROBLOX.

items.name: Instamatic Tent
items.description: Tent - activate!  Bam - you've got a tent.  No messing around with poles and stakes for you!

items.name: Wizards of the Astral Isles: Rat Plague Summoner
items.description: Summon a horde of infected rats to chase your enemies.  One bite and they're toast!

items.name: Gear Recycler
items.description: Everything old is new again! Put a gear item in, get a gear item of similar type out!

items.name: Silly Stilts
items.description: You'll earn that scholarship to clown college in no time!

items.name: Slingshot
items.description: It's a sure shot everytime!  Well only if you've got great aim....

items.name: Pizza Kunai
items.description: Delicious and deadly. Click to grab kunai and throw up to 5 at once.

items.name: Cloak of the Undying
items.description: Adorn this cloak, and none shall stand in thou's way, m'lord.

items.name: Dark Falchion
items.description: A trusty blade in all storms.

items.name: Snow Wolf Companion
items.description: A great companion is always by your side, even in the coldest weather.

items.name: ROBLOX U Frisbee
items.description: It's pretty much impossible to get through university without playing some Ultimate.

items.name: Yellow Snowball
items.description: Ewww...  say no to yellow snow.

items.name: Club Boates Disco Ball
items.description: Summon your very own club and dance anywhere!

items.name: Tone's Water Polo Ball
items.description: Hit it with your player while swimming to have it bounce into the air and away from you. Makes different sounds depending on whether its hit by a player/hit the ground/splashes against water. After two minutes, it pops! No worries, every 30 seconds you can release another into play.

items.name: Swordbreaker
items.description: Fights like a sword - breaks enemies swords - who could ask for anything more?

items.name: Merely's Hover Surfboard
items.description: It's spring break, and the surf is up!  "But wait," you say, "I'm not near the ocean." With Merely's Hover Surfboard, no ocean, no problem!  Hover along on your delightful hover surfboard - wherever you are in the world! We know you have many choices when you hover, but when you want the best, make it a Merely! Don't seranok it until you've tried it!

items.name: Paper Ninja Stars
items.description: Ever had a paper cut? It's like that, but a lot worse. Click to throw in the direction of your cursor; three fly, twirling toward their target. The further they move away from you, the more they spread apart. Upon striking an opponent, they stick and deal 15 damage each.
